allow: Bash(powershell -command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Processor | Select-Object Name, NumberOfCores, NumberOfLogicalProcessors, MaxClockSpeed | Format-List; Get-WmiObject Win32_PhysicalMemory | Select-Object DeviceLocator, @{N=''Capacity_GB'';E={[math]::Round\($_.Capacity/1GB\)}}, Speed | Format-List; Get-WmiObject Win32_VideoController | Select-Object Name, @{N=''VRAM_GB'';E={[math]::Round\($_.AdapterRAM/1GB\)}} | Format-List")
